response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:27: Identified song 'Play' (プレイ) by Tokino Sora performed by Tokino Sora herself. 2. 00:27-04:06: Identified talk/merchandise showcase segment. 3. 04:06-05:00: Identified ticket information and outro. 4. Used search tool to confirm song title. Constructed final JSON with identified metadata.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a performance of Tokino Sora's song 'Play' followed by a segment where she showcases birthday merchandise with her bear companion, Ankimo, and announces ticket information for her 9th anniversary live event.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora performs her song 'Play' with her bear companion Ankimo.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Ah... 戻れない　ないものねだりの夢の果て
Ah... 踊っている　夢の中で
戻れるかな　あの頃の自分に
いや、もう戻れないから
調子に乗らせて　踊らせてみるのが
楽でいいのかもしれないな
なんてね。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: Ah... I can't return to the end of the dream, always wishing for what I don't have. Ah... I'm dancing, even if I'm just dreaming. Can I go back to that time again? No, I can't. So I'll just watch it, maybe that's easier. Who knows?

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Ankimo chat, perform funny movements, and showcase birthday merchandise including a Happi coat, a wide rubber mat, a phone ring, and a plushie.
Tokino Sora presents ticket information for her 'Everyday of Light' live event and gives final details about the birthday goods.
